basics.name: namePrefix
basics.label: Resource name prefix
basics.toolTip: Prefix for all resource names. 3-15 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Must start with a letter.

constraints.validationMessage: 3-15 characters, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens only. Must start with a letter.

elements.name: enableWindowsServer2022
elements.label: Windows Server 2022
elements.toolTip: Datacenter Azure Edition (Gen2). IaaS VM workloads.

elements.name: enableWindowsServer2025
elements.label: Windows Server 2025
elements.toolTip: Datacenter Azure Edition (Gen2). IaaS VM workloads.

elements.name: enableWindows11MultiSession
elements.label: Windows 11 Multi-Session
elements.toolTip: Win11 24H2 AVD edition — pooled AVD session hosts.

elements.name: enableWindows11SingleSession
elements.label: Windows 11 Single-Session
elements.toolTip: Win11 24H2 Enterprise — AVD personal hosts or standard VMs.

elements.name: enableRhel8
elements.label: RHEL 8
elements.toolTip: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8 PAYG (Gen2). RHEL license cost included.

elements.name: enableRhel9
elements.label: RHEL 9
elements.toolTip: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 PAYG (Gen2). RHEL license cost included.

elements.name: installAzureMonitorAgent
elements.label: Install Azure Monitor Agent
elements.toolTip: Pre-installs AMA. Data collection rules must be assigned post-deployment.

elements.name: installDefenderForEndpoint
elements.label: Install Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
elements.toolTip: Pre-installs MDE binary. Onboarding package must be applied post-deployment via Defender portal or Intune.

elements.name: enableSecurityHardening
elements.label: Enable CIS-aligned security hardening
elements.toolTip: Windows: registry, TLS, SMBv1, firewall. Linux: sysctl, SSH restrictions, firewall, legacy service removal.

elements.name: enableAvdOptimizations
elements.label: Enable AVD optimizations (Windows 11 only)
elements.toolTip: Installs FSLogix, configures Teams AVD mode, applies OS tuning. Applied only to Windows 11 images.

elements.name: buildScheduleDayOfMonth
elements.label: Day of month
elements.toolTip: Day of month to run the scheduled build. Default 15 = ~3 days after Patch Tuesday.

elements.name: buildScheduleHour
elements.label: Hour (UTC)
elements.toolTip: Hour (UTC) to start the build. Default 2 = 02:00 UTC.

elements.name: notificationEmail
elements.label: Notification email
elements.toolTip: Email address for build success/failure alerts. Leave empty to disable.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid email address or leave empty.

elements.name: enableLogAnalytics
elements.label: Deploy Log Analytics workspace
elements.toolTip: Deploys a Log Analytics workspace for centralized build log aggregation.

elements.name: useVNetInjection
elements.label: Enable VNet injection
elements.toolTip: Injects the AIB build VM into a customer VNet. Required for private script storage or strict outbound rules.

toolTip.virtualNetwork: VNet where the AIB build VM will run.
toolTip.subnets: Subnet for the AIB build VM. Must not have an NSG blocking AIB service tags.

elements.name: usePrivateScriptStorage
elements.label: Use private script storage
elements.toolTip: Deploys a private Azure Blob container and uploads scripts during deployment. Required if GitHub is not reachable from the build environment.
